response.diagnosis: Joint velocities exceed rated limits during PTP trajectory acceleration phase. The trapezoidal velocity profile has excessive acceleration at the start of motion, causing joint 2 and joint 3 to exceed 110% of their rated velocity.

suggested_repairs.description: Reduce trajectory velocity scaling factor from 1.0 to 0.5
Increase acceleration/deceleration time to 0.3s for smoother ramps
Add blend radius between PTP segments to smooth transitions

response.alternative_approach: Consider using S-curve velocity profiles instead of trapezoidal to reduce jerk and peak velocities.
